Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Blood Sage]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 18''' — The Blood Sage is a character who has spoken of Eithan Arelius.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Blood Sage claims the right to train Yerin Arelius.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Blood Sage is a character who was once driven off by Min Shuei.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yan Shoumei was called away by the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Blood Sage attended the tournament.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin assumes the Blood Sage is involved in how her Shadow is kept from hollowing her out.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 23''' — The Blood Sage is a character.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The Blood Sage was crouching at the feet of the Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Blood Sage was interested in Yerin and Ruby combining at Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Blood Sage is interested in examining Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage is a character who chews on his thumb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage carried many people during the teleportation.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage ordered the children upstairs and told Arelius to move.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage uses a Forged claw to slash through Eithan's Hollow Armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage resembles a skeleton with skin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — The Blood Sage was standing opposite a bleeding Eithan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Blood Sage questioned Eithan's identity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 28''' — The Blood Sage had run off.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — The Blood Sage was summoned by Seishen Daji using a spatial anchor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Sage is the Sage of Red Faith and appears as a tall, skeletal man with white hair down to his knees and red lines from his eyes that look like bloody tears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Sage claims to be part of a revolution in the sacred arts that will surpass Emriss.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 15''' — Eithan had previously fought the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 18''' — The Blood Sage used a teleportation anchor to transport Overlords.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Blood Sage's voice can be transmitted through aura.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — The Blood Sage is one of the cult leaders who arrived.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin must show her face to the Blood Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Blood Sage is a man who Eithan and Dross have told Lindon about.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Blood Sage has long white hair and scarlet lines running down from his eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Blood Sage is a researcher who was once called the mad tool of a Dreadgod.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Blood Sage was previously called a crazed researcher of forbidden knowledge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Blood Sage was previously called 'ghost child.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Blood Sage believes Redmoon's organization is known as a cult because of Redmoon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 9''' — The Blood Sage claims that if he were in charge, the organization would be known as a research society.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Blood Sage possesses a void space.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Blood Sage uses a syringe filled with a shining violet elixir.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Sage is a character with a skeletal face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Blood Sage has a twin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Blood Sage slunk past Yerin and Little Blue.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Sage has white hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Blood Sage is believed to be mortally injured.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Blood Sage uses blood techniques.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Blood Sage is a source of information mentioned by Yerin.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 3''' — The Blood Sage scuttled off.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
